assumptions: The question concerns consolidated IFRS financial statements.
The issue is whether foreign exchange risk arising from an intragroup dividend receivable could be addressed within IFRS hedge accounting.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for eligible hedged items and hedging instruments.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats cash flow hedge accounting as a separate hedge accounting model, including for highly probable forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 establish a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation.
